extortion.description: [AI generated] The company "itc.gov.ae" refers to the Integrated Transport Centre (ITC) in Abu Dhabi, UAE. ITC is responsible for regulating and managing all aspects of land transport and traffic in the emirate. It focuses on developing efficient transport systems, enhancing traffic safety, and providing public transport services like buses and taxis. ITC aims to ensure sustainable and innovative mobility solutions for residents and visitors.
